permission.storage_denied: Permission denied, cannot read diary files

onboarding.welcome_desc: An AI-powered companion diary focused on soul depth and memory autonomy.
onboarding.philosophy_desc: BaiShou is more than a diary; it's an extension of your inner consciousness. Keeping every moment alive through AI-assisted compression.
onboarding.compression_desc: We believe memory's weight lies in depth, not redundancy. Cascade compression distills daily entries into life's highlights.
onboarding.ai_setup_desc: BaiShou itself does not store your AI keys. Configure standard OpenAI compatible protocols to start your soul dialogue.
onboarding.api_guide_desc: BaiShou doesn't store your keys. Please go to "Settings > Provider Management" to configure OpenAI or Gemini protocols.
onboarding.privacy_desc: Your data is stored only locally. With end-to-end sync, you maintain complete control over your memory sovereignty.
onboarding.storage_desc: BaiShou stores data in the system Documents by default. You can specify a custom folder (e.g., USB drive or sync drive) to keep your memories mobile.
onboarding.storage_permission_error: Cannot access selected directory, please ensure read/write permissions.

summary.algorithm_desc: Based on the BaiShou cascade folding algorithm, redundent data is automatically filtered to build our collective memory context.
summary.copy_prefix_hint: Automatically added to the front of copied content (e.g., Hi, these are my memories...)
summary.cascade_folding_content:
To provide the AI with the most efficient memory context, BaiShou uses a 'Cascade Folding' algorithm:

1. Overlap Mechanism: If a Monthly or Quarterly report has been generated for a period, the system assumes the AI already understands the macro-context of that time, so it folds (hides) original diary entries from that period in the shared memory.
2. Progressive Detail: The system prioritizes keeping detailed diaries from the most recent weeks, while older memories are presented through higher-dimensional forms like Weekly, Monthly, or Quarterly reports.
3. Distillation vs Redundancy: This ensures that within limited Token constraints, the AI can see both recent details and the big picture without getting bogged down in an overwhelming sea of raw diary entries.
summary.error_select_range: Please select a date range first
summary.no_data_range: No diary data found in this range
summary.raw_data_desc: Lossless export of all diary data within a range, including metadata and tags.
summary.lookback_folded: Collective Memories (Past $months months - Folded by Algorithm)

summary.shared_memory_desc: High-value memory fragments, folded and extracted for quick sharing and review.

about.title: About BaiShou

This will IRREVERSIBLY clear all your data and restore the app to factory state.

Are you absolutely sure you want to continue?
developer.clear_success_content: All data cleared. Please restart the app manually.
developer.load_demo_full_desc: Load sample diaries for testing. Will not delete existing data.

privacy.title: Privacy & Philosophy
privacy.data_ownership_desc: BaiShou believes memory is a soul extension. Your data is stored locally. Unauthorized uploads never occur beyond your chosen AI/Sync providers.
privacy.local_first_desc: Write diaries offline seamlessly. AI summaries are generated on-demand; we don't store your generated texts.
privacy.transparency_desc: Supports end-to-end data export. Take your memories with you anytime via ZIP or sync to your own S3/WebDAV space.

rag.title: RAG Memory Management
rag.clear_all_content: Are you sure you want to delete all embedded vector data? This action cannot be undone.
rag.rag_disabled_hint: Global memory is disabled, Agent will not use RAG retrieval
rag.detect_failed: Detection failed, please check model config
rag.clear_dim_content:
Delete all ${dimension}-D vector data?
Other dimensions will not be affected.
rag.batch_embed_content:
This will read all diary entries and generate vector embeddings.
Existing entries will not be re-embedded.
This may take some time.
rag.memories_auto_hint: Memories will be stored here automatically after chatting with Agent
rag.migration_pending_content:
The previous embedding migration was not completed (possibly due to app crash).

Continue migration? Backup data is still safe.
rag.migration_model_changed_content:
Embedding model change detected.

Old vector data is incompatible with the new model dimensions, all data needs to be re-embedded.

This will:
• Backup existing text metadata
• Clear old vectors and re-embed with new model
• Auto-verify data integrity after completion

Process runs asynchronously in the background.
